india_apis.name: Disability Verification API
india_apis.description: The Disability Verification API verifies an person with disability's disability information against authoritative government systems using the Unique Disability ID (UDID) and returns validated profile details, disability status, application state, and an optional certificate download link.

inputs.name: appId

inputs.name: transactionId
inputs.description: A unique identifier for tracking a user journey

inputs.description: NACH template image file (JPG, TIFF, PNG, max 10Mb)

india_apis.description: The following document highlights the details of the Fetch IFSC from UPI ID API.

inputs.name: vpa
inputs.description: The Virtual Payment Address, also known as the UPI ID of the user

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: The name associated with the bank account corresponding to the provided VPA

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: The status of the request

inputs.name: statusCode
inputs.description: The HTTP status code for the response

inputs.name: result
inputs.description: The JSON object containing the IFSC and VPA verification details

inputs.name: result.referenceId
inputs.description: A unique identifier assigned to the verification process or transaction

inputs.description: The status of the VPA verification, indicating whether it was successful or not

inputs.name: result.message
inputs.description: A message related to the verification process or transaction

inputs.name: result.ifsc
inputs.description: The IFSC associated with the bank account. It uniquely identifies a bank branch participating in various payment systems within India

inputs.description: The VPA provided as input

inputs.description: The name associated with the bank account corresponding to the provided VPA

inputs.name: result.ifscDetails.rtgs

inputs.name: result.ifscDetails.upi
inputs.description: The availability status of the Unified Payments Interface (UPI) service for the bank

inputs.name: result.ifscDetails.address

inputs.name: result.ifscDetails.category
inputs.description: The category of the bank branch, if applicable

inputs.name: result.ifscDetails.swiftCode
inputs.description: The SWIFT code for international transactions, if available

inputs.name: result.ifscDetails.micr
inputs.description: The Magnetic Ink Character Recognition (MICR) code of the bank branch

inputs.name: result.ifscDetails.nbin
inputs.description: The National Bank Identification Number (NBIN), if applicable

inputs.description: The JSON object containing request metadata

india_apis.name: DigiLocker Fetch eAadhaar API
india_apis.description: The following document highlights the details of the DigiLocker Fetch eAadhaar API.

inputs.name: referenceId
inputs.description: The unique reference identifier

inputs.name: aadhaarFile
inputs.description: The parameter that fetches the customer's eAadhaar details

inputs.name: rawAddressFields
inputs.description: The parameter that controls address formatting in the response. When set to "yes", the API adds an addressFields object in the response with the user's address segregated into relevant fields. When set to "no", the response contains only the address field with the user's address as a single string value

inputs.name: returnYob
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether year of birth (yob) is returned in the response. When set to "yes", the API adds a yob field in the response with the user's year of birth. When set to "no", the response contains only the dob field with the user's date of birth as received from DigiLockerinfo The format of Date of Birth in the response matches the eAadhaar format; either DD/MM/YYYY or year only (YYYY), depending on what is displayed in the eAadhaar.

inputs.name: returnFatherName
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether the father's name is returned in the response. When set to "yes", the API adds a fatherName field in the response with the user's father's name

inputs.name: signedImage
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether a signed photo URL is returned in the response. When set to "yes", the API adds a signedPhotoFile field in the response with the user's S3 pre-signed URL photo

inputs.name: useV2StorageLocation
inputs.description: The parameter that enables dashboard visibility and controls aadhaar file URL expiry. When set to "yes", you can view the data in the dashboard and the aadhaar file URL expiry will be set for three hours

inputs.name: blockMinors
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether minor accounts are blocked. When set to "yes", the API returns a 400 response denoting the digilocker account belongs to a minor

inputs.name: returnCreatedTimeStamp
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether the created timestamp is returned in the response. When set to "yes", the API returns the epoch timestamp in milliseconds for the created timestamp of the aadhaar file

inputs.name: aadhaarFileGenerationChannel
inputs.description: The parameter that controls the formatting of the aadhaar file. Based on the values passed (default or cvl), the formatting of the aadhaar file changes

inputs.name: returnUserConsentError
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether a 400 error is returned when consent is not provided. When set to "yes", the API returns a 400 error in case consent is not provided by the user to access the Digilocker account

inputs.name: returnSummary
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether a summary key is returned in the response. When set to "yes", the API adds a summary key in the response

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: The status of the request

inputs.name: statusCode
inputs.description: The HTTP status code for the response

inputs.name: result
inputs.description: The JSON object containing the eAadhaar details

inputs.name: result.name
inputs.description: The name of the customer

inputs.name: result.dob
inputs.description: The date of birth of the customer

inputs.name: result.address
inputs.description: The address of the customer

inputs.name: result.maskedAadhaarNumber
inputs.description: The masked Aadhaar number of the customer

inputs.name: result.photo
inputs.description: The base64 string of the customer's profile photo

inputs.name: result.summary
inputs.description: The object containing summary information. This field is returned when returnSummary is set to "yes"

inputs.name: result.summary.action
inputs.description: The action status in the summary

inputs.name: result.summary.details
inputs.description: The array containing summary details

inputs.name: result.addressFields
inputs.description: The object containing segregated address fields

inputs.name: result.addressFields.co
inputs.description: The care of field in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.country
inputs.description: The country in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.district
inputs.description: The district in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.subDistrict
inputs.description: The subdistrict in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.postOffice
inputs.description: The post office in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.house
inputs.description: The house number in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.locality
inputs.description: The locality in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.pincode
inputs.description: The pincode in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.state
inputs.description: The state in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.street
inputs.description: The street in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.vtc
inputs.description: The village, town, or city in the address

inputs.name: result.addressFields.landmark
inputs.description: The landmark in the address

inputs.name: result.gender
inputs.description: The gender of the customer

inputs.name: result.aadhaarFile
inputs.description: The S3 URL for the Aadhaar file

inputs.name: result.xmlAadhaarFile
inputs.description: The link to the XML Aadhaar file

inputs.name: result.createdTimeStamp
inputs.description: The epoch timestamp in milliseconds for the created timestamp of the aadhaar file. This field is returned when returnCreatedTimeStamp is set to "yes"

india_apis.name: Find Face API
india_apis.description: The Find Face API identifies whether a target face exists in a group image and returns data about the closest match.

inputs.name: content-type
inputs.description: This parameter defines the media type for the request payload

inputs.name: appId
inputs.description: The application ID shared by HyperVerge

inputs.name: appKey
inputs.description: The application key shared by HyperVerge

inputs.name: transactionId
inputs.description: The unique ID for the customer journey

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: The target face image to search for

inputs.name: groupimage
inputs.description: The group image containing multiple faces

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: The type of target image

inputs.name: referenceId
inputs.description: referenceId is an identifier for the API call and is echoed back by the server in the response. This referenceId can be used to create logical grouping of single/multiple API calls based on business logic of the consumer of API. HyperVerge's QC dashboard can be used to fetch logs grouped by the Reference ID.

inputs.name: uuid
inputs.description: This is an advanced feature designed to prevent tampering of response by a man in the middle. If uuid is set, the response will include an X-Response-Signature header which will have a checksum of the response body signed with the uuid and a private key.

inputs.name: enableDashboard
inputs.description: This will give access to an exclusive dashboard built by HyperVerge for Quality Check and debugging purpose.

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: The status of the request

inputs.name: statusCode
inputs.description: The HTTP status code of the response

inputs.name: match-score
inputs.description: The similarity score between the target face and the closest match in the group image. It is a number between 0 to 100

inputs.name: face-found
inputs.description: Indicates whether a match was found above the threshold. Returns 'yes' if the match score is greater than or equal to the determined threshold, and 'no' otherwise

inputs.name: to-be-reviewed
inputs.description: Indicates whether the match needs manual verification. Returns 'yes' if manual review is required, and 'no' otherwise

inputs.name: matching-face-crop
inputs.description: The base64 encoded image of the closest matching face from the group image

india_apis.name: Email Risk and Domain Verification API
india_apis.description: The following document highlights the details of the Email Risk and Domain Verification API.

inputs.name: email
inputs.description: The email address to be verified

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: The status of the request

inputs.name: statusCode
inputs.description: The HTTP status code for the response

inputs.name: result
inputs.description: The JSON object containing the email verification details

inputs.name: deliverable
inputs.description: Indicates whether the email address actually exists or not, using a fast SMTP-MX check

inputs.name: domainName
inputs.description: The domain of the email address of the user

inputs.name: tld
inputs.description: The top-level domain of the email address

inputs.name: creationTime
inputs.description: The date and time when the domain was created (UTC time zone)

inputs.name: updateTime
inputs.description: The date and time when the domain was last updated (UTC time zone)

inputs.name: expiryTime
inputs.description: The date and time when the domain is set to expire (UTC time zone)

inputs.name: registered
inputs.description: Indicates whether the email's domain is registered

inputs.name: companyName
inputs.description: The name of the company that manages the reservation of the domain name

inputs.name: disposable
inputs.description: Indicates if the email's domain is fraudulent such as disposable email, previous fraudulent domains

inputs.name: freeProvider
inputs.description: Indicates whether the email address is from a free email provider such as gmail, hotmail

inputs.name: dmarcCompliance
inputs.description: Indicates if the email's domain is DMARC (Domain-based Message Authentication Reporting and Conformance) enforced

inputs.name: spfStrict
inputs.description: Indicates if the SPF is sufficiently strict enough to prevent spoofing

inputs.name: suspiciousTld
inputs.description: Indicates if the email's top-level-domain is likely to be fraudulent or risky

inputs.name: websiteExists
inputs.description: Indicates if the email's domain has a website or not

inputs.name: acceptAll
inputs.description: Indicates if the server is set to receive all emails at this domain

inputs.name: custom
inputs.description: Indicates if customer domain configuration is present

inputs.name: breach
inputs.description: Information about any data breaches related to the email address

inputs.name: breach.isBreached
inputs.description: Indicates whether the email address has been involved in any data breaches

inputs.name: breach.noOfBreaches
inputs.description: The number of data breaches involving the email address

inputs.name: breach.firstBreach

inputs.name: referenceId
inputs.description: The unique reference identifier generated in the initial request

inputs.name: pan
inputs.description: The parameter that confirms if the API should fetch the PAN details from the DigiLocker account

inputs.name: dl
inputs.description: The parameter that confirms if the API should fetch the Driving License (DL) details from the DigiLocker account

inputs.name: panFile
inputs.description: The parameter, when set to yes, controls whether the PAN file should be fetched from the user's DigiLocker account. The pan file will be returned in the form of an s3 url that will be valid for 15 minutes

inputs.name: dlFile
inputs.description: The parameter, when set to yes, controls whether the driving license file should be fetched from the user's Digilocker account. The DL file will be returned in the form of an s3 url that will be valid for 15 minutes

inputs.name: blockMinors
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether a 400 response is returned if the DigiLocker account belongs to a minor. When set to "yes", the API returns a 400 response

inputs.name: returnAllFieldsFromDigilocker
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether all fields for PAN and DL are retrieved from the DigiLocker account. When set to "yes", the API retrieves all available fields

inputs.name: useV2StorageLocation
inputs.description: The parameter that enables dashboard visibility. When set to "yes", you can view the data in the dashboard

inputs.name: enableRetry
inputs.description: The parameter that controls retry behavior. When set to "yes", the API retries the same request three times before generating a response

inputs.name: returnFileNotFoundError
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether a file not found error is returned. When set to "yes", returns file not found error if failed to fetch pan/dl files after 3 retries. Note: This parameter should be passed only when enableRetry is set to "yes"

inputs.name: returnSummary
inputs.description: The parameter that controls whether a summary key is returned in the response. When set to "yes", returns summary key in response

global_apis.name: NIN Verification API
global_apis.description:
The NIN Verification API, or the VNIN verification API, retrieves a user's personally identifiable information(PII)
based on their Nigerian national identification number(NIN).

global_apis.name: USA Driver's License Verification API
global_apis.description: This document highlights the details of the USA Driver's License Verification API.

inputs.name: content-type
inputs.description: This parameter defines the media type for the request payload

inputs.name: appId
inputs.description: The application identifier shared by HyperVerge. You can find the details in the dashboard's credentials tab.

inputs.name: appKey
inputs.description: The application key shared by HyperVerge. You can find the details in the dashboard's credentials tab.

inputs.name: transactionId
inputs.description: A unique identifier for tracking a user journey

inputs.name: firstName
inputs.description: The first name of the driver's license holder

inputs.name: lastName
inputs.description: The last name of the driver's license holder

inputs.name: dlNumber
inputs.description: The Driver's license number of the driver's license holder

inputs.name: state
inputs.description: The state where the Driver's license was issued

inputs.name: dob
inputs.description: The date of birth of the driver's license holder

inputs.name: address
inputs.description: The residential address of the driver's license holder. Required for states not covered by the AAMVA Database

inputs.name: zip
inputs.description: The ZIP code associated with the residential address of the driver's license holder. Required for states not covered by the AAMVA Database

inputs.name: city
inputs.description: The city name associated with the residential address of the driver's license holder. Required for states not covered by the AAMVA Database

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: The status of the API request

inputs.name: statusCode
inputs.description: The HTTP status code indicating the result of the request

inputs.name: result
inputs.description: The result object containing verification details

inputs.name: result.details
inputs.description: Verification results for the driver's license information

inputs.name: result.details.dlNumberMatch
inputs.description: Indicates if the driver's license number matches

inputs.name: result.details.firstNameMatch
inputs.description: Indicates if the first name matches

inputs.name: result.details.lastNameMatch
inputs.description: Indicates if the last name matches

inputs.name: result.details.dobMatch
inputs.description: Indicates if the date of birth matches

inputs.name: result.details.stateMatch
inputs.description: Indicates if the state ID or state code matches

inputs.name: result.summary
inputs.description: Summary of the verification action and details

inputs.name: result.summary.action
inputs.description: The action taken based on the verification results

inputs.name: result.summary.details
inputs.description: Additional details related to the verification, if any
